nasb.text: These two things have befallen you; Who will mourn for you? The devastation and destruction, famine and sword; How shall I comfort you?

esv.text: These two things have happened to you— who will console you?— devastation and destruction, famine and sword; who will comfort you?

cnv.text: 荒涼與毀滅，饑荒與刀劍， 這兩樣臨到你， 誰為你悲哀呢？ 誰能安慰你呢？

ccb.text: 荒凉、毁灭、饥荒、 战祸已临到你身上， 谁会为你哀哭呢？ 谁能安慰你呢？

csbs.text: 毁坏与破败， 饥荒与刀剑， 这两组事情已经临到你， 谁会为你悲哀呢？ 谁会安慰你呢？
